_doc: PERF-INIT-V2 PR-M1: route-based performance budgets. See docs/performance/PERF-INIT-V2-plan.md §2.1.
_phase: PR-M1 scaffold + advisory matrix. Hard gate enforcement (auth fixture + warm cache priming + INP interaction injection + baseline ratchet) deferred to PR-G1.
_methodology: median of 5 runs, foreground only, fixed Chrome version (Playwright bundled), CPU/network profile noted, hidden-page invalid

routes._note: 12-month leader target. Conditional PR-B4a /login micro-entry triggered if cold transfer >800 KB after PR-B1/B2/B3.
Current baseline (2026-05-11): cold transfer 14419 KB, decoded 49947 KB, TBT 2937ms. Hard pass requires PR-B1a + PR-B1b + PR-B2 rollout.
Warm reload fresh fetch budget. Runner cache-priming implementation is PR-G1 scope; advisory until then. Current baseline: 8231 KB warm fresh.
Grid route — AG Grid Community + filter/sort/pagination. Sentinel uses page heading; grid load is independent (data API may fail in testai without seed).
mfe-access wildcard route redirects /admin/access/* → /access/roles (AccessApp.ui.tsx line 82). expectedPath declares canonical post-redirect target so PR-B5c-lite redirect guard does not false-fail.

AG Grid Enterprise + ECharts heavy route. Sentinel REQUIRES grid root (.ag-root-wrapper or .ag-root) — heading-only would false-pass when the grid is still mounting (Codex 019e2112 P0 fix). Current baseline (2026-05-11): warm 6591 KB, decoded 49966 KB, TBT 2937ms, 10 long tasks / 3437ms total.
MFE route-change navigation budget. Soft-nav harness implementation is PR-G1 scope; advisory until then. Soft-nav is the dominant user pattern; reload is rare.
Full silent-SSO + cookie exchange + shell mount + first-content render. Diagnostic only; not a hard gate in phase 0-3 months.

_regressionPolicy._doc: First 2 weeks after baseline commit: artifact + warn only. After: any metric >5% above baseline -> hard fail. Documented in PMD §10 communication plan.
